calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jan-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Corman (by Court Call) for Gregor MacGregor.

The Court inquired as to Mr. MacGregor's physical and mental abilities; counsel responded as set forth on record. The Court further inquired as to the amount of money in the trust. Mr. MacGregor stated that it was estimated between $50,000.00 and $100,000.00. Mr. MacGregor presented additional argument to support his petition to modify the trust. At the conclusion of counsel's argument, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
